name: greytHR
description: greytHR is a full-suite HRMS platform designed to expedite complex, recurring, and critical HRand payroll functions Learn more about greytHR

reviews.review_title: GreytHR helps us manage all HR activities
reviews.review_description: The ease of usage is arguably one of the best features. The intuitive design makes it easy to keep tabs on employees' time off and attendance. Insightful data can also be gleaned from the available reporting choices.
reviews.review_pros: Our company has found GreytHR to be an invaluable tool for managing its human resources. Paystubs, credit information, insurance policies, and more are all easily accessible thanks to the excellent document center. Applying for time off is a simple procedure. It's a great way to keep track of important dates like birthdays, work anniversaries, and more for all of our staff members.
reviews.review_cons: The only drawback to using Greythr is that it always logs us out when we shut the browser. It seems like a security measure to me.

reviews.review_description: We are having a good experience so far, . Modules are very easy to use and navigations are smooth and simple . System is easy understandable to employees as well as admins .
reviews.review_pros: Interface is user friendly and UI is engaging . Supporting videos and Bella is really useful. Page navigations are smooth and quick. All reports are available in simple steps .
reviews.review_cons: Customer support . For employee information and leave modules the support is quick and correct, but when its payroll module, many of the support agent not trying to understand the real concern or they dont have a clear idea about the payroll rules. Many uploads to be done from backend, if its available for admins, tickets can be reduced .

reviews.review_description: Nothing to say, very pathetic service 1. Lack of technical expertise to handle the escalation 2. Complicated Interface 3. Lot of technical glitches after the latest update 4. Failing to inform the customers about the changes that happened in the portal 5. Unable to customise the things as per our requirements.
reviews.review_pros: 1. Noting as such pathetic service looking to migrate to another platform like keka, bamboo, etc. We are exploring them.
reviews.review_cons: 1. Lack of technical expertise to handle the escalation 2. Complicated Interface 3. Lot of technical glitches after the latest update 4. Failing to inform the customers about the changes that happened in the portal 5. Unable to customise the things as per our requirements.

reviews.review_description: This is a great tool we can use and understand easily.Helps manage PF, ESI, TDS, and other statutory obligations with minimal manual effort.Handles salary calculations, tax deductions, payslips, and compliance. Saves significant time during payroll runs.
reviews.review_pros: Easy Understanding the tools and modules.Clean, user-friendly interface that makes daily tasks straightforward. Simple onboarding process for both admins and employees. Handles salary calculations, tax deductions, payslips, and compliance. Saves significant time during payroll runs. Quick Respons from GreytHR Team i like most this thing
reviews.review_cons: Some times taking time to to open the application. If any updates in greytHR team has to inform the updates to users. users can understand the changes and they can update the things what can required.

reviews.review_title: this is not the greythr, it's Great peak HR, The legend HR for all the hr software.,
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: overall experience with the software is eco-friendly, easy to access. Agents are professional, to fast reaction.
reviews.review_pros: As HR i like payroll process, once adopt the greytHR Software. My work is simple and easy in the Employee engagement activates.
reviews.review_cons: Ticket issues, resolved. in the quick action. Attendance tracking with swipe attachments, is quite slow. need to improve.,

reviews.review_description: Overall, GreytHR is well-regarded for its robust HR and payroll functionalities, offering significant value to businesses seeking to automate their HR processes. While there are areas for improvement, such as enhancing customer support and reporting features, the software remains a popular choice among users.
reviews.review_pros: User-friendly interface Comprehensive HR and payroll features
reviews.review_cons: Occasional customer support delays Initial setup may be time-consuming

reviews.review_description: Absolutely impressed with the product and especially the warm-hearted and helpful support people.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use. Extensive help availability. Quick and detailed support from customer support.
reviews.review_cons: There is nothing specific that I could point out. One minor irritant is the popups that come as soon as I log-in could be great if we could find some other method to get user attention for events and offers.

reviews.review_description: Overall is good. but you have to be upgraded some areas for user friendly. As per our experience users can not understanding the options rapidly.
reviews.review_pros: I would like to greytHR overall developed style I most like the Mass email communication.
reviews.review_cons: The main issues we are facing there is not available approved leave forms PDF printing option in greytHR.

reviews.review_title: Efficient HR Management with Room for Improvement
reviews.review_description: I've had a good overall experience with GreytHR. It is a dependable and effective HR management application that makes personnel administration, payroll, and attendance tracking easier. HR procedures run more smoothly thanks to the automation features, which also save time and minimize errors.
reviews.review_pros: GreytHR is easy to use and streamlines HR procedures through automation, increasing the effectiveness of payroll, attendance, and staff management. It increases overall productivity, decreases errors, and saves time.
reviews.review_cons: The user interface could also be more modern and intuitive.

reviews.review_description: greytHR is well-regarded for its ease of use, robust HR features, and its ability to streamline many HR functions
reviews.review_pros: It helps ensure businesses stay compliant with labor laws and regulations in India, particularly with regard to statutory requirements like PF, ESI, and tax calculations.also all type of hr activities
reviews.review_cons: The tiered pricing model may not always feel justified for companies with simpler HR needs. try to reduce pricing

reviews.review_title: Im pretty comfortable in using greytHR for my daily payroll acitivities
reviews.review_description: Overall I'm happy using the software, may be reports module also to be better.
reviews.review_pros: The payroll features, it saves lot of time and I don't have to worry if all the rules and regulations as per labor law is covered. I just trust the way it is built and ensure accurate outputs are given.
reviews.review_cons: I'm not comfortable with leave granting, this needs to be user friendly and needs improvement. It is confusing while granting leaves.

reviews.review_description: It's good softwear. Iam really enjoyed to work in this softwear. But some time some issues are not solved long time. Salary structure automated not done. Exit module
reviews.review_pros: It's easy to process payroll, attendance management, leave magemnent.
reviews.review_cons: Some of things not given training. Not implemented. We so many times requested to solve the issue. But they told transfer to team.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Good and effective data management software
reviews.review_pros: Easy to understand and well proper data management
reviews.review_cons: Need to focus upon management related report even on free or less estimated customer also.

reviews.review_description: It was a really good experience with the GreytHR Team, Its payroll processing is also good and time-consuming.
reviews.review_pros: Customer Care ticket resolving service is good
reviews.review_cons: Geo Fencing service across the office and branches is not upto the mark

reviews.review_pros: Its easy to handle and there is no lagging anywhere
reviews.review_cons: On waiting for customer support need to wait for clearing the ticket

reviews.review_title: Amazing Platform with Great Support Team!
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Interactions with professional support team is a great experience. We have almost configured everything i.e. custom policies as per our organizational requirement.
reviews.review_pros: GreytHR is very user friendly and flexible and can be configured as per one's requirement.
reviews.review_cons: Lot of automation from backend is a time consuming process. Rest everything is perfect.

reviews.review_description: Greyt HR Software provides wide range of services for users. There will be effectiveness in each and every module what they have. They will solve the queries of user quickly. It is highly recommendable!
reviews.review_pros: Greyt HR is a user friendly tools which helps in Attendance management, Onboarding, Offboarding, Payroll and many more other activities. Greyt HR have a dedicated customer support team they will continuously work to solve the queries of the users.
reviews.review_cons: There is nothing to dislike about Greyt HR Software.

reviews.review_description: Earlier we were manually preparing the HR records and it has multiple mistakes. But after introducing Greythr we are not worry free for ESS, Payroll, leave and employee KYC and asset portals
reviews.review_pros: Its cost, payroll, leave management and employee self portal i really liked much
reviews.review_cons: It should have compliance reports neat and clean in the report section for Haryana State. It majorly covers the tax reports of south india.

reviews.review_description: Experience was very much impressive and it’s easy to use user interface both on web and application is very comfortable to use
reviews.review_pros: From log in to log out to applying for leave and keeping a track of our performance and attendance everything is implemented very smoothly in this software effectively .
reviews.review_cons: Basically nothing , but it should make a secured server to punch in from organisation server .

reviews.review_title: User Friendly HR Software & Leave Management
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Overall, my experience with greytHR has been incredibly positive. The HR software intuitively responds to my needs and offers the perfect platform for managing tasks such as payroll processing and attendance tracking. Furthermore, greytHR allows me to take full advantage of various automated features to ensure that I'm getting the most out of the system without having to put in too much effort. With efficient reporting capabilities as well, it gives me peace of mind that data is being collected and stored easily. Moreover, flexible user control features enable different people within the enterprise to access only specific information they need while keeping sensitive data away from unauthorized users. Altogether, greytHR has been an extremely useful tool that provides great value at a competitive price point and I'd recommend it highly.
reviews.review_pros: GreytHR is an innovative HR software designed to make your HR processes easier and more efficient. Reduce paperwork and simplify employee leave management, attendance tracking, payroll processing with a single dashboard. Better manage your entire payroll processes with automated compliance updates and in-house customizations tailored to your business needs. Utilize over 15 features specifically designed for home-based businesses or multi-structure companies like salary structures, job profile tracking, tax calculations, statutory deductions, and salary release foresight reports. GreytHR provides you power over how you want to manage company resources of people and money.
reviews.review_cons: GreytHR may offer a wide range of HR management solutions, but it is not without its drawbacks. One concerning issue is that access to employee records can be limited due to the lack of ability for offline viewing, which can prove inconvenient and dangerous should an emergency arise. Furthermore, integration with other systems may be difficult, leading to redundancies in management processes and data inconsistencies. Finally, users may at times experience difficulty in navigating through the interface, which can hinder their efficiency as they are attempting to access and update information.

reviews.review_description: As against using the excel; this was a great alternative Reduced the processing time to more than a half helped tracking the leaves and calculating LOP
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use Very prompt customer support and a knowledgeable team Fast Well designed
reviews.review_cons: The landing pages have been changing..the current one is quite dull I wish the CTC concept was there where direct integration with QB was possible

reviews.review_title: One Stop solution for all HR processes
reviews.review_pros: What stood out to me the most about greytHR was its user-friendly interface and intuitive navigation. It made managing HR tasks feel effortless, and the range of features available really streamlined our processes. Additionally, the comprehensive reporting capabilities provided valuable insights, contributing to more informed decision-making. Overall, greytHR greatly simplified our HR operations and enhanced our efficiency.
reviews.review_cons: Its limited customization options for certain features. While the platform offers a range of useful functionalities, there were instances where I wished I could tailor certain aspects more to our specific needs. Overall, while this was a minor drawback, it didn't significantly detract from the overall positive experience with the software.

reviews.review_pros: It’s best for user (employees) for having easy access to all HR activities. It is holistic tool encompassing Personal Information, Salary information, Tax related activities, Leave management and Expense claim management. User friendly platform helped me to enhance my productivity.
reviews.review_cons: Actually, I didn’t noticed anything that could be disliked for this wonderful employee engagement tool. All features worked well as expected which means that no areas of improvement applicable according to me.

reviews.review_title: GreytHR - Ease of Human resource management
reviews.review_description: Overall a great app for human resource managemen
reviews.review_pros: User Friendly, All on one place App, Payslip and one down managment. Employee profile & Tax declaration assistance.
reviews.review_cons: App sometimes does not work, Bug fixes to be done on APP

reviews.review_description: There are no such problems with the greytHR portal. We have so many benefits by using this greytHR like PaySlips, Leave Management, Expenses Claims.. Also, greytHR provides up-to-date information about the employees.
reviews.review_pros: GreytHR, is a Human Resource app which can be used by all employers. I have been using this greytHR portal for three years. It's the best application that is useful for every employee. First thing, that we use this greytHR portal for daily Attendance purpose. We can easily access this greytHR portal. Generally, we won't get PaySlips directly to our emails, there will be a different types of process in different companies. By using this greytHR portal, we can easily download our PaySlips anytime. Also, It's a friendly app in Android Mobiles. We can use Leave Management Feature in greytHR very easily. Lot of other features also available like, Holiday Calendar, Employee Lifecycle Management and Expense Claims etc.
reviews.review_cons: I don't have much dislikes about this greytHR. It's a best app which every one can access easily. There are some minor issues with greytHR is, sometimes while we are using the app and logging into portal it will take long time.
